goal:
Now make the same image-input behavior consistent for clipboard paste and drag-drop, without re-explaining 
 the architecture.
summary: Refined image path regex, unified vision model warnings, and synchronized attachment state clearing between Steer and Normal modes
detail: Extended extractImagesFromText to handle drag-drop file paths by refining the regex to require path prefixes, overcoming an obstacle where the initial pattern was too permissive and matched random words. Unified vision model incompatibility feedback so both Steer and Normal modes use showWarning() with identical messaging. Synchronized attachment state clearing logic so Steer mode resets clipboardImageSeq and updates the UI bar like Normal mode. Build verified successfully.
